heading: Usernames
body:
Atlas uses the full Distinguished Name (DN) of users in your LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol)
server as the Atlas username. For example, an example LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) user
named `ralph` has the following username in Atlas:

`cn=ralph,cn=Users,dc=aws-atlas-ldap-01,dc=myteam,dc=com`
